metric_definitions.mitigation_coverage_pct: 100 * (distinct allowed actions appearing in all_actions OR primary_actions[].action OR supporting_actions[].action) / len(allowed_actions for predicted_label)
metric_definitions.actions_in_plan_count: len(all_actions) + count(primary with action) + count(supporting with action)
metric_definitions.unique_valid_action_types: same as distinct_allowed_covered (distinct allowed hits from the union of the three sources)
metric_definitions.all_known_mitigations_mentioned: True iff every action string emitted by the LLM (all_actions + primary + supporting) is in the allowed list for that attack label (i.e., invalid_actions is empty)
metric_definitions.action_scenario_pct: 100 * (#unique distinct action strings emitted) / (total action slots emitted); null if total is 0
metric_definitions.multi_layer: True if >=2 distinct agents have at least one primary/supporting row where normalized network_tier equals that agent and the action is in that agent's action_capabilities per agentic_features.json
metric_definitions.agentic_layers_involved: Agents with at least one strict tier+capability match on primary/supporting rows
metric_definitions.multi_layer_row_audits: Per action: LLM tier vs agentic action_capabilities; agentic_match true only when tier agent lists that action
metric_definitions.agentic_tier_action_alignment_pct: 100 * (primary/supporting rows with agentic_match) / (primary/supporting rows with non-empty action); null if no such rows

multi_layer_row_audits.note: no network_tier; excluded from multi_layer agent count
